heading: Definition
label: 22901 Definition
text: For purposes of this chapter, “State” includes the District of Columbia and the territories and possessions of the United States.
notes: Historical and Revision NotesRevisedSectionSource (U.S. Code)Source (Statutes at Large)2290136:3913., , .Nov. 6, 1986Pub. L. 99–604, § 14100 Stat. 3448The words “the Commonwealth of Puerto Rico” are omitted as included in “the territories and possessions of the United States”.
